title: slirp4netns: set mtu to 65520
body:
it improves significantly the performance of the slirp4netns network:

https://github.com/rootless-containers/slirp4netns/tree/777bdccceffa5bee38dbfd9eefc06628cc160ff6#iperf3-netns---host

Signed-off-by: Giuseppe Scrivano <gscrivan@redhat.com>

comments.body:
LGTM, not sure how I missed this one yesterday.
My only comment is wondering if the values  for the mtu, the fd, etc in the command should be configurable.   Not to be solved in this PR, just something to consider.
@giuseppe I think you just overrode your PR?
yes, I've fixed the same issue that there was for Podman
